/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/qt_simple_app.dir/qt_simple_app_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_simple_app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_simple_app.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o qt_simple_app  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
